entries.statement: Conduct comprehensive AI risk assessments to identify and document technical, organizational, and mission risks, including threat identification, vulnerability analysis, and risk mitigation strategies for AI systems and components.

Perform AI architecture security reviews and threat assessments to identify security gaps, evaluate vulnerabilities, analyze threat actors and attack surfaces, and develop security risk management plans.

Design and execute comprehensive AI system testing and validation programs, including test plan development, evaluation master plans, automated testing frameworks, test data management, and results analysis to identify failure modes.
Conduct threat modeling and assessment to identify threat actors, characterize attack surfaces, evaluate threat criticality, analyze insider risks, and develop threat profiles for AI systems.

Establish and operate continuous monitoring programs for deployed AI systems to assess operational performance, measure compliance with risk controls, detect performance degradation and behavioral drift, and report monitoring findings.

Develop and maintain enterprise risk management documentation including AI system design specifications, testing procedures, validation standards, model cards, evaluation reports, and audit records meeting governance and regulatory requirements.

Produce and communicate risk management reports for senior leadership and board governance bodies, including aggregate AI risk assessments, continuous monitoring findings, remediation progress, and strategic risk mitigation recommendations.

Establish and maintain enterprise model inventory and governance structures, including AI model registration, risk-based tiering, development standards, approval gates, validation cadences, and lifecycle management through retirement.

Develop machine learning and AI code testing and validation procedures, including model behavior analysis, performance metric evaluation, failure mode identification, and reliability assessment methodologies.

Define and implement risk measurement methodologies and quantitative metrics for assessing AI system risks, including sensitivity analysis, performance measurement requirements, and continuous monitoring metrics.
